results.title: IMS Gear: Customizable Planetary Gears for Every Industry Need
results.snippet: A planetary gear (also: epicyclic gear) is a technical design that serves as a "link" for power transmission between a drive source (the motor) and an application to be moved (e.g. the movement of a wheel).

results.title: Planet Carrier: Anatomy, Load Paths, and Design Trade-Offs
results.snippet: Planet Carrier Anatomy A typical carrier contains five to seven distinct precision features: arms, plates, planet pin bores, bearing journals, a central hub bore, lubrication channels, and retention features. results.snippet: Matex Products was incorporated in 1980 and is a distributor of Matex planetary gear systems. We are available to assist you with any questions you may have and to help recommend the correct gearing for your application.

results.title: High Precision Planetary Gear | Compact | HPG Gearbox
results.snippet: The HPG Harmonic Planetary® gear features a high capacity cross roller bearing to support heavy payloads. The Harmonic Planetary gearbox design allows for backdrivability while ensuring high efficiency performance, maximizing elapsed operational time before recharging is necessary.
